data.title: Add testing_mode routing to sprint SKILL.md and task-execution prompt
data.description:
## Description

Update sprint orchestrator to read testing_mode from task descriptions and route to the appropriate test-writing behavior.

### Gate 2 Justification
SKILL.md routing logic and task-execution.md Step 4 update must be committed together: routing without the prompt update sends tasks to the wrong behavior (Gate 1), and the prompt update without routing never activates (Gate 1).

### Steps
1. In `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` Phase 4 (Sub-Agent Launch):
   - After reading each task's description, extract the `## Testing Mode` section value
   - Route based on testing_mode:
     - RED: dispatch dso:red-test-writer as today (existing behavior)
     - GREEN: skip RED test dispatch entirely. Sub-agent validates existing tests pass after implementation.
     - UPDATE: sub-agent modifies existing tests to assert new behavior before implementing
     - No testing_mode field (backward compat): default to current RED behavior
2. In `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md`:
   - Update Step 4 (Test validation) to respect testing_mode:
     - RED: current behavior (write failing test first)
     - GREEN: skip test writing, validate existing tests pass post-implementation
     - UPDATE: modify existing test file(s) to assert new expected behavior before implementing
     - No testing_mode: current behavior (backward compat)
3. Remove .test-index RED marker

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` — Edit (Phase 4 routing)
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md` — Edit (Step 4 update)
- `.test-index` — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Sprint eval passes (PRIMARY behavioral criterion)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md contains testing_mode routing
  Verify: grep -q "testing_mode\|Testing Mode" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Task-execution prompt respects testing_mode
  Verify: grep -q "testing_mode\|Testing Mode" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] Backward compatibility: default behavior when no testing_mode
  Verify: grep -q "default\|backward.compat" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q "\[sprint_testing_mode" .test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
